failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id AS profile_id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
)
SELECT 
    p.profile_id, 
    pub.description
FROM publication pub
JOIN target_profile p ON pub.profile_id = p.profile_id
WHERE pub.description ILIKE '%dica%' 
   OR pub.description ILIKE '%lifestyle%'
   OR pub.description ILIKE '%dicas%'
ORDER BY pub.num_likes DESC, pub.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    pub.description
FROM publication pub
JOIN profile p ON pub.profile_id = p.id
WHERE p.username = 'eusougabriela'
  AND (
      pub.description ILIKE '%dica%' 
      OR pub.description ILIKE '%lifestyle%'
      OR pub.description ILIKE '%dicas%'
  )
ORDER BY pub.num_likes DESC, pub.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    pub.description
FROM publication pub
JOIN profile p ON pub.profile_id = p.id
WHERE p.username = 'eusougabriela'
  AND (
      pub.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'dica | lifestyle | dicas')
  )
ORDER BY ts_rank(pub.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('portuguese', 'dica | lifestyle | dicas')) DESC, pub.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
